basic_details.job_title: ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Dental Officer and Para Medical Staff Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Dental Officer and Para Medical Staff
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Koraput has released the official Medical Officer, Dental Officer and Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the ECHS Koraput Medical Officer, Dental Officer and Para Medical Staff Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with age limits up to 66 years for Medical Officer, 65 years for Dental Officer, and 58 years for Dental A/T/H and possessing qualifications such as MBBS, BDS, Diploma in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces) can submit their applications through offline mode o

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max age limits: 66 for Medical Officer, 65 for Dental Officer, 58 for Dental A/T/H
age_limit.details: Medical Officer: Maximum age limit is 66 years. Dental Officer: Maximum age limit is 65 years. Dental A/T/H: Maximum age limit is 58 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, BDS, Diploma in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces)
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS. Minimum 03 years experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in Medicine/Surgery. Dental Officer: BDS. Minimum 03 years work experience. Dental A/T/H: Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces). Minimum 05 years work experience in Dental Laboratory.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Koraput Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Koraput Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ECHS Koraput Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ECHS Koraput Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: MBBS. Minimum 03 years experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in Medicine/Surgery. Dental Officer: BDS. Minimum 03 years work experience. Dental A/T/H: Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/ Class-1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces). Minimum 05 years work experience in Dental Laboratory.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Koraput Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Koraput Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: Maximum age limit is 66 years. Dental Officer: Maximum age limit is 65 years. Dental A/T/H: Maximum age limit is 58 years.

rows.event: Last date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026 is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officer, Dental Officer, and Para Medical Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of Medical Officer, Dental Officer, and Para Medical Staff under the ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer position, candidates must possess an MBBS degree. Additionally, a minimum of 3 years of experience post-internship is required, with a preference for those with additional qualifications in Medicine or Surgery.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Dental A/T/H post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Dental A/T/H post is 58 years. Candidates must ensure they meet this age criterion to be eligible for the position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Dental Officer post?
faq.answer: The Dental Officer post offers a salary of Rs. 95,000/- per month. This is a contractual position under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Koraput.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer, Dental Officer, and Para Medical Staff positions at ECHS Koraput will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for the ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the given address.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit self-attested photocopies of testimonials supporting their Educational Qualifications, Aadhar card, Pan card (mandatory), and Work Experience along with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official website for ECHS Koraput?
faq.answer: The official website for the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme is www.echs.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the ECHS Koraput Recruitment 2026 is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.
